originalAlarm.description: Value stored to 'buf' is never read

reasoning: eef2317b9f5.c L26: 'buf = malloc(bufsize)' dead store when CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP=F. When !CLEAN_UP, the only uses of buf (if(buf) and free(buf)) are inside the #ifdef CLEAN_UP block and are not compiled. So the malloc result stored in buf is never subsequently read. Genuine dead store (also a memory leak). PC=!CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP correctly constrained. New bug.
